steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Use custom regression for the one unknown coefficient in $y=900ax^2$. Enter the known point as $x_1=[2.75]$, $y_1=[9528.75]$, then type $y_1\sim 900a x_1^2$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=1.4$, so $900a=1260$. Evaluate the model at $x=7.50$: $1260(7.50)^2=70{,}875$.
